_comment: Copy this file to config/fleet-relays.json and paste the real fleet entries from your HiveRelay handoff doc. Loaded at attach() time by backend/relay-service.js; missing/empty/malformed degrades silently to pure DHT auto-discovery.
_bootstrapNote: bootstrap[] is honored ONLY when the HiveRelay client owns its own swarm. Pear-native desktop runs in advanced mode and hands the client the app's shared Hyperswarm, so the client does NOT own the swarm and these entries are a no-op. Pear-native discovers relays over the DHT RELAY_DISCOVERY_TOPIC regardless. Leave empty unless you are an embedder running the client with its own swarm; if set in advanced mode the app logs 'relay-fleet-bootstrap-ignored' on boot.
_overrides: Per-install override: drop fleet-relays.json into the app's Pear.config.storage dir (printed on boot as 'storagePath').
